These directories contain glyph range tiles (PBF) rendered from the following
fonts, redistributed (via https://github.com/emfcamp/map, web/public/fonts/)
for offline use by the MapLibre GL style in ../emfmap.js. Both fonts are
licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1 (https://scripts.sil.org/OFL):

Open Sans Regular:
  Copyright 2020 The Open Sans Project Authors (https://github.com/googlefonts/opensans)

Raleway SemiBold:
  Copyright 2010 The Raleway Project Authors (impallari@gmail.com), with Reserved Font Name "Raleway"

The SIL Open Font License permits redistribution, modification (including
subsetting into glyph tiles), and bundling, provided the font is not sold by
itself and any modified versions are not distributed under the original font
name. Full license text: https://scripts.sil.org/OFL
